systems.system_notes: Public source anchor for the Medtronic CD HORIZON posterior spinal fixation system.

components.component_notes: Official Medtronic sources describe the broader CD HORIZON spinal fixation family.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Public spine fixation product pages do not describe a dedicated tray in the current pass.
